first-date.intro: you are driving to meet someone new nothing feels urgent yet
first-date.outro: you got through the first conversation

marriage.intro: years later the tone is tighter every delay feels loaded
marriage.outro: the argument pauses but the tension stays

prompts.incoming: did you read my last message

dying-wife.intro: the hospital texts are short every second hurts
dying-wife.outro: you keep driving but something is already slipping away
